title: DataSourceBundleDefinition - Metadata API
description: Represents the bundle of streams that a user adds to a data kit.

dataPlatform.description: Indicates the connector type that the streams in the bundle belong to.

description.description: A description of the associated data source bundle. This field is available in API version 53.0 and later.

icon.description: The icon used in the deployment flow. This field is available in API version 53.0 and later.

isMultiDeploymentSupported.description: Indicates if the bundle can be deployed multiple times or not. Default value is false.

masterLabel.description: Indicates the name of the bundle.

bundleVersion.description: Indicates the version of the bundle. This field is available in API version 63.0 and later.
